heading: Omitted
label: 1772d Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to acceptance of land by the Secretary of the Interior in trust as a reservation for use and benefit of the Seminole Tribe, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 100–228, § 6101 Stat. 1559Dec. 31, 1987
